name: First State Bank
description_short: Lynnville, IA residents bank at First State Bank's branch located on 413 East St.
description_long:
First State Bank's branch is located at 413 East St in Lynnville, IA, serving the local community as a convenient banking facility. The Lynnville location provides in-person services for residents and small business owners throughout the area. While specific hours are not currently published online, you can visit the branch directly to confirm their schedule.

This Lynnville First State Bank branch offers essential banking services including deposits, withdrawals, account management, and small business banking support. Visit the team at 413 East St to discuss your financial needs and explore available solutions. Since phone contact information is not currently available, stopping by directly is the best way to speak with banking professionals.

For Lynnville residents, this local First State Bank branch provides convenient access to essential banking services. Remember to bring your government-issued ID when visiting. The branch serves as a trusted financial resource for individuals and businesses throughout Lynnville and the surrounding IA region.
